title: Solar panel
summary: A solar panel is a device that converts sunlight into electricity using photovoltaic cells. Residential rooftop installations have grown rapidly as homeowners seek to reduce grid dependence and lower energy bills. Modern panels typically last 25–30 years and pair well with battery storage systems.

title: Heat pump
summary: A heat pump is a heating and cooling system that transfers thermal energy from outside air, ground, or water into a building. Air-source heat pumps are increasingly used as a lower-carbon alternative to gas furnaces, especially when paired with rooftop solar generation.

title: Electric bicycle
summary: An electric bicycle, or e-bike, is a bicycle with an integrated electric motor that assists pedaling. E-bikes are popular for commuting and short trips, offering a low-emission alternative to cars for urban mobility and last-mile transport.

title: Building insulation
summary: Building insulation reduces heat transfer through walls, roofs, and floors, lowering the energy required to heat and cool a home. Upgrading attic and wall insulation is one of the most cost-effective retrofits for improving household energy efficiency.

title: Taylor Swift
summary: Taylor Swift is an American singer-songwriter known for narrative songwriting and genre-spanning albums. Her Eras Tour became one of the highest-grossing concert tours in history, drawing massive media coverage and fan engagement worldwide.

title: Academy Awards
summary: The Academy Awards, commonly known as the Oscars, are annual awards honoring artistic and technical achievement in the film industry. The ceremony attracts global television audiences and generates extensive red-carpet fashion and celebrity coverage.

title: Marvel Cinematic Universe
summary: The Marvel Cinematic Universe is a shared universe of superhero films and television series produced by Marvel Studios. Blockbuster releases regularly dominate box-office charts and drive merchandising, streaming, and fan-community discourse.

title: 2024 Atlantic hurricane season
summary: The 2024 Atlantic hurricane season produced an above-average number of named storms, with several making landfall along the Gulf and East Coasts. Coastal evacuations, infrastructure damage, and recovery funding dominated regional news coverage for months.

title: 2024 United States presidential election
summary: The 2024 United States presidential election determined the president and vice president for the 2025–2029 term. Campaign rallies, debate performances, polling swings, and policy disputes generated sustained national media attention through Election Day.

title: Sourdough bread
summary: Sourdough bread is leavened with a starter culture of wild yeast and lactobacilli rather than commercial yeast. Home baking surged in popularity during the 2020s, with enthusiasts sharing starter maintenance tips and crust-scoring techniques online.

title: Mariana Trench
summary: The Mariana Trench is the deepest oceanic trench on Earth, located in the western Pacific Ocean. Crewed and robotic submersible expeditions have explored its hadal zone, discovering extremophile organisms adapted to crushing pressure and near-freezing temperatures.

title: Philately
summary: Philately is the study and collection of postage stamps and related postal history. Collectors value rare misprints, commemorative issues, and postmarks, and major auction houses regularly sell individual stamps for six-figure sums.
